assertions.title: Existing v6 marathon matches are backfill-only and preserve prior linked records while skipping missing members

steps.action: Review the archived existing-v6 apply comparator for round 13897.
steps.expected: Apply should preserve challenge-level and already-present linked-record snapshots while adding no duplicate work.
steps.observed: Round 13897 apply remained a pure no-op: `createdSubmitterResources=0`, `createdSubmissions=0`, `createdFinalScores=0`, and `createdProvisionalScores=0`; challenge field snapshot and resource/submission/review identity sets remained unchanged.

evidence.network: Existing-v6 challenge/resource/submission/review snapshots were compared pre/post apply.

assertions.title: A second apply run preserves the fully reconciled steady state across every writable surface

steps.action: Compare pre/post summaries for fully imported rounds 13897 and 17948 after rerun apply validation.
steps.expected: Challenge/resource/submission/review identity sets should remain unchanged and new writes should be zero.
steps.observed: Round 13897 pre/post summaries matched exactly (`resourceCount=796`, `submissionCount=1784`, `reviewSummationCount=2009`), and round 17948 pre/post summaries also matched exactly (`resourceCount=47`, `submissionCount=370`, `reviewSummationCount=415`). Their apply outputs both reported zero created resources/submissions/finals/provisionals.

evidence.network: Steady-state verification used shared-env rerun applies plus pre/post API summaries.

summary: Validated the 2 remaining existing-v6 rerun assertions: both passed. Shared-environment rerun evidence for 13897 and 17948 showed pure no-op apply behavior with unchanged challenge/resource/submission/review footprints.
